summary.key_theme: ServiceNow 憑藉強勁的 AI 合作夥伴生態系與分析師看好其長期價值，成功抵銷了短期市場波動與競爭壓力。

bullish.title: A Look At ServiceNow (NOW) Valuation After Analyst Upgrade And New AI Partnerships
bullish.reason: 分析師將評級上調至 Outperform，結合 AI 合作夥伴關係擴張，被視為推動股價上漲的核心催化劑。

bullish.title: ServiceNow Expands AI Reach via Partnerships: More Upside Ahead?
bullish.reason: 透過與 Microsoft 和 OpenAI 等巨頭合作，加速企業級 AI 採用，直接提升了營收成長預期。

bullish.title: Trade Tracker: Stephanie Link buys ServiceNow
bullish.reason: 知名投資人 Stephanie Link 公開表示買入，顯示機構投資者對該公司基本面的信心。

bullish.title: Carahsoft Technology Expands Collaboration With ServiceNow
bullish.reason: 與 Carahsoft 擴大合作，將 AI 平台推廣至北美經銷商生態系，有助於擴大市佔率。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer on ServiceNow (NOW): “I Do Think That the Company Represents Actual Value at These Prices”
bullish.reason: Jim Cramer 強調該公司在當前價格下具備實際投資價值，吸引散戶關注。

bullish.title: ServiceNow Cohesity Alliance Targets Resilient AI Agents
bullish.reason: 與 Cohesity 合作強化 AI 代理的數據安全性，提升產品競爭力與黏著度。

bearish.title: ServiceNow Inc. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors
bearish.reason: 股價表現落後於同業，反映短期市場情緒波動與資金輪動壓力。

bearish.title: Mark Cuban Dismisses Gen Z Unemployment Fears As 'Wrong,' Countering Bill Gates' Warning That Even AI Skills May Not Guarantee Stability
bearish.reason: 提及 ServiceNow 對 AI 導致失業的警告，可能引發市場對 AI 倫理或社會衝擊的負面聯想。

neutral.title: ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅為市場熱度分析，提供投資人基本事實參考，無明確買賣建議。

neutral.title: FJTSY vs. NOW: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
neutral.reason: 同業比較分析，旨在協助投資人進行資產配置，不構成直接股價驅動因素。
